allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); scripts=d.get\('scripts',{}\); devdeps=d.get\('devDependencies',{}\); print\('scripts:', json.dumps\(scripts, ensure_ascii=False\)\); print\('vitest:', devdeps.get\('vitest','없음'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('prisma version:', d['version']\)")

PowerShell(try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/ingredients/search?q=ephedrine&status=all" -UseBasicParsing; $res.Content } catch { $_.Exception.Response | ForEach-Object { $stream = $_.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/ingredients/search?q=ephedrine&status=all" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $data = $res.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "ok=$\($data.ok\) total=$\($data.total\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU, @{N='cmd';E={\(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine}})
